name: dataviewer
description: Web-based dataset analysis and annotation tool for robot demonstration datasets

scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && DATA_DIR=${DATA_DIR:-../../../datasets} DATAVIEWER_AUTH_DISABLED=${DATAVIEWER_AUTH_DISABLED:-true} uv run uvicorn src.api.main:app --reload --port ${BACKEND_PORT:-8000}
scripts.build:frontend: cd frontend && npm ci && npm run build
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.lint:backend: cd backend && uv run ruff check src/
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.validate:backend: cd backend && uv run ruff check src/ && uv run --with-editable ../../../evaluation/vlm_judge pytest
scripts.validate: npm run validate:backend && npm run validate:frontend
scripts.validate:fix: cd backend && uv run ruff check src/ --fix && cd ../frontend && npm run lint:fix && npm run format:fix && npm run validate
